zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Sinclair於1074年出生時，他的父親William Sinclair30歲，母親Dorothy Agnes Dunbar17歲。他於大約1100年與Rosabel Strathearn在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1153年在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林享年79歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林。

zh-hans.Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland: 苏格兰米德洛迪安洛斯林
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Sinclair于1074年出生时，他的父亲William Sinclair30岁，母亲Dorothy Agnes Dunbar17岁。他于大约1100年与Rosabel Strathearn在苏格兰米德洛迪安洛斯林结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1153年在苏格兰米德洛迪安洛斯林享年79岁，埋葬在苏格兰米德洛迪安洛斯林。

nameMeanings.name: Sinclair
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Saint-Clair-sur-Elle (Manche), so called from the dedication of its church to Saint Clarus (see   Clare   3).
Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish surname.

History: The Scottish family Sinclair (see 1 above) came to southern Scotland in the twelfth century from Huntingdonshire with the de Morvilles. Descendants of these Sinclairs became earls of Caithness in the 15th century. The frequency of the surname in Caithness and Orkney is largely due to the adoption by tenants of the name of their overlord.

variants.name: Clare
meanings: Irish (Clare, Wicklow, and Wexford): habitational name from Clare in Suffolk (an eastern county of England), the center of a major Norman baronial estate since the Norman Conquest. The English placename probably originated as a Celtic river name meaning ‘bright, gentle, or warm’. The surname is not from the Irish county name Clare, which is either from the surname or from a place called with Gaelic clár ‘plank bridge’. Another Norman surname in the southeast of Ireland was de Clere, from Clères in Seine-Maritime (France), named from the local river.

English and French: from the Middle English, Old French female personal name Cla(i)re (from Latin Clara, from clarus ‘clear, bright, famous’) which achieved some popularity, greater elsewhere in Europe than in England, through the fame of Saint Clare of Assisi (see Chiara ). The English surname seems to have been interchangeable with Clear 1.

English: occupational name from an agent derivative of Middle English cley ‘clay’. The work of medieval clayers involved plastering a framework of interwoven twigs with mud to produce wattle-and-daub work.

variants.name: St. Clair
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Sinclair  . This is also a French Canadian and American French altered form of the same surname.
French (Saint-Clair): habitational name from any of several places, e.g. in Normandy, named Saint-Clair (from the dedication of their churches to Saint Clarus). Compare Saintclair .

Haitian (also Saint-Clair): ornamental name or nickname, perhaps ironic, composed of French saint ‘saint’ or ‘holy’ and clair ‘clear’ or ‘lightness’. Alternatively, perhaps of the same French origin as 2 above. Compare Saintclair .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Sinclair was born in 1074, his father, William Sinclair, was 30 and his mother, Dorothy Agnes Dunbar, was 17. He married Rosabel Strathearn about 1100, in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1153, in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, at the age of 79, and was buried in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Sinclair est né en 1074, son père, William Sinclair, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Dorothy Agnes Dunbar, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Rosabel Strathearn environ 1100, à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1153, à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterré à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Sinclair 1074 geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Sinclair 30 und seine Mutter Dorothy Agnes Dunbar 17. Er hat um 1100 in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland Rosabel Strathearn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1153 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland und wurde in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Sinclair è nato il nel 1074, il suo padre, William Sinclair, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Dorothy Agnes Dunbar, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Rosabel Strathearn circa 1100, nel Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1153, nel Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolto a Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Sinclairが1074年に生まれた時，父William Sinclairは30歳，母Dorothy Agnes Dunbarは17歳であった。約1100年にスコットランドミドロスアンロスリンでRosabel Strathearnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1153年にスコットランドミドロスアンロスリンで79歳で死去し，スコットランドミドロスアンロスリンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Sinclair(이)가 1074년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Sinclair(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorothy Agnes Dunbar(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1100년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에서 Rosabel Strathearn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1153년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Sinclair nasceu em 1074, seu pai, William Sinclair, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Dorothy Agnes Dunbar, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Rosabel Strathearn aproximadamente 1100, em Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1153, em Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, com 79 anos, e foi sepultado em Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Sinclair родился в 1074 г., его отцу по имени William Sinclair было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Agnes Dunbar, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Rosabel Strathearn около 1100 г. в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1153 г. в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия в возрасте 79 лет и был похоронен в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Sinclair nació en 1074, su papá, William Sinclair, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Dorothy Agnes Dunbar, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Rosabel Strathearn aproximadamente 1100, en Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1153, en Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultado en Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland.
